title: rubus tumidus
intro: Rubus tumidus, also known as the thorny raspberry, is a species of bramble native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus tumidus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive well-being. Herbal preparations of Rubus tumidus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall health and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
